buyVerifiedDomain.text:
If you do not have your own business domain, our recommendation is to purchase such a domain. You have 2 alternatives:
  • You can purchase a domain independently and then verify the domain you purchased according to the instructions detailed at the bottom of the guide.
  • Use the Pulseem sales team to purchase a business domain and verify it according to the requirements.
    Contact the support team by phone: 03-9192513 or send an email: Support@simplyclub.co.il

gmailVerificationDescription:
This column shows the corresponding status of the selected domain with GMAIL servers.
The test process takes several minutes. You can click the refresh button to get an updated status according to the following details:

 Unverified domain - please contact Pulseem's support department by phone: 03-9192513 or by email at: Support@simplyclub.com.
- Domain successfully verified
tooltipPurchaseNewFeature: Purchase directly from the dashboard by clicking on the SMS or Newsletter options below. Have questions? Call support at 03-9192513
